mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, description, article_count, sort_order, default_folder, status, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM collection_folder WHERE id = #{id} and deleted = 0

SELECT id, user_id, name, description, article_count, sort_order, default_folder, status, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM collection_folder WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND name = #{name} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collection_folder (id, user_id, name, description, article_count, sort_order, default_folder, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{articleCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{defaultFolder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.select: SELECT article_count FROM collection_folder WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE collection_folder SET article_count = article_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{folderId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM collection_folder WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, description, article_count, sort_order, default_folder, status, create_time, update_time FROM collection_folder WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY default_folder DESC, sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
